docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY VISHNEVSKAYA, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, LINA LINDA MONTOYA, TEODORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DEFT'S CONTC ORDER FILED; PAID $10 FEE; FOLDER UTL/(506); TO TRAY.
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST "DENIED, UNTIMELY"; CALLED BOTH PARTIES;MAILED COPIES TO BOTH PAR- TIES;FOLDER TO TRAY.
THE PARTIES HAVE BEEN CONTACTED BY PHONE THAT THE HEARING HAS BEEN CONTINUED. CONTRADICTING THE PREVIOUS ROA ENTRY, THE CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-11-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-25-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO FILE THIS LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. DEFENDANT MUST APPEAR ON JULY 25, 2007, @ 8:30AM WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VISHNEVSKAYA, ANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTOYA, LINA LINDA MONTOYA, TEODORA $1,173.68 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,223.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
COPIES OF REQUEST TO PAY JUDGEMENT TO COURT, MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF. ENDORSED COPIES GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING DEPARTMENT AND TO PLAINTIFF.
FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT ENTERED AS TO DEFTS MONTOYA, LINA LINDA & MONTOYA, TEODORA.
